title: potentilla arenaria subvar. septenata
intro: Potentilla arenaria subvar. septenata, also known as Beach Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Beach Cinquefoil can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and promote natural healing.
